auditLogs.searchPlaceholder: Search by user, action or resource
auditLogs.emptyDesc: System and user actions will appear here as changes are made.
auditLogs.noResults: No audit logs match your search
auditLogs.pageDescription: View and filter system audit trail and user actions.
auditLogs.exportColumnsHint: Choose which data to include in the export.
auditLogs.descLicenseViewed: License key was viewed in Settings.
auditLogs.descLicenseCopied: License key was copied to clipboard.
auditLogs.descZoneCreated: New location "{{name}}" was created and is {{statusLabel}} with {{zoneCount}} zone(s).
auditLogs.descZoneDeleted: Zone "{{name}}" was permanently deleted from the system.
auditLogs.descEmployeeCreated: New employee "{{name}}" was added to the system and assigned to zone {{zone}}, shift {{shift}}.
auditLogs.descEmployeeUpdated: Employee profile for "{{name}}" was updated (zone, shift, contact, or status may have changed).
auditLogs.descEmployeeDeleted: Employee "{{name}}" was permanently removed from the system.
auditLogs.descEmployeeBlocked: Employee "{{name}}" was disabled/blocked and can no longer access the system or be assigned to shifts.
auditLogs.descEmployeeCheckIn: Employee "{{name}}" checked in. Agent shift mode: check-in recorded for attendance tracking.
auditLogs.descEmployeeCheckOut: Employee "{{name}}" checked out. Agent shift mode: check-out recorded for attendance tracking.
auditLogs.descAdminCreated: New admin "{{name}}" ({{email}}) was added with role {{role}}.
auditLogs.descAdminDeleted: Admin "{{name}}" ({{email}}) was removed from the system.
auditLogs.descShiftCreated: New shift "{{name}}" was created for zone "{{zone}}" with break time {{breakTime}}.
auditLogs.descShiftUpdated: Shift "{{oldName}}" ({{zone}}) was updated: name "{{newName}}", break time {{breakTime}}, {{statusLabel}}.
auditLogs.descShiftDeleted: Shift "{{name}}" in zone "{{zone}}" was permanently deleted.
auditLogs.descCameraCheckInOutAdded: New check-in/check-out camera added in settings.
auditLogs.descCameraSettingsUpdated: Camera configuration (check-in/check-out and onboarding) updated in settings.
auditLogs.descBrandingUpdated: Application branding (name and logo) updated in settings.
auditLogs.descPreferencesUpdated: Application preferences updated (name, logo, theme, or display density).
auditLogs.descTimeConfigUpdated: Check-in and check-out time windows updated in settings.
auditLogs.descPersonCreated: New person "{{name}}" was added to the system.
auditLogs.descPersonDeleted: Person "{{name}}" was permanently removed from the system.
auditLogs.descReportExport: Report export requested (format: {{format}}, data types selected).
auditLogs.descReportGenerate: Report generated for date range {{dateFrom}} to {{dateTo}}.
